title: MGP Protocol Capabilities
description: Negotiable protocol-layer capabilities for lifecycle, transport, and asynchronous behavior.

supports_discovery.description: Whether the implementation exposes discovery metadata such as /mgp/capabilities.

supports_initialize.description: Whether the implementation supports an explicit initialize handshake.

supports_runtime_capability_negotiation.description: Whether initialize can accept runtime-side capability declarations.

supports_negotiated_capabilities.description: Whether initialize returns an explicit negotiated_capabilities object.

requires_initialize.description: Whether callers must successfully initialize before issuing normal operations.

supports_stateless_http.description: Whether the stateless HTTP profile is supported.

supports_streamable_http.description: Whether a future streamable HTTP profile is supported.

supports_sessions.description: Whether the protocol exposes a protocol-level session distinct from business session_id.

supports_async_operations.description: Whether long-running operations can be accepted asynchronously.

supports_notifications.description: Whether the implementation can emit protocol notifications.

supports_subscriptions.description: Whether clients can subscribe to change feeds or similar event streams.

supports_ping.description: Whether a protocol-level ping/keepalive primitive is supported.

transport_profiles.description: Transport profiles supported by the implementation.

supported_profiles.description: Protocol profiles currently understood by the implementation.

default_profile.description: Preferred default profile when the caller does not request one explicitly.

session_mode.description: Whether the implementation is operating in a stateless or stateful protocol mode.
